violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ( slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer to be broken down and sanitized before use. Proper cleaning procedures to be reviewed with all employees. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer and pepper/cucumber slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024
The hand sink in the back area was observed with a leak. System must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024
Packages of chicken were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023

Packages of chicken was observed thawing in the handwashing sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing.PIC removed packages and continue thawing in prep sink under cold running water. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the counters under equipment and shelves throughout facility have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
Handwashing sink is not in good repair and/or improper adjustment. Faucet observed leaking at cold water handle New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

The floors in walk in coolers and kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
